hooks.message: ⚠️ Editing .env is not allowed. Use .env.example as reference and set environment variables manually.

SessionStart.name: reinject-context
SessionStart.description: Re-inject project context after session compaction

hooks.prompt: IMPORTANT: This is Carbon Relay, a Go-based carbon news collection system. It collects articles from 39 free sources directly (no OpenAI API required). Use ./pipeline -sources=all-free -perSource=5 for standard runs. See CLAUDE.md for full details.

UserPromptSubmit.name: project-reminder
UserPromptSubmit.description: Remind about Carbon Relay project context on first user prompt

hooks.prompt: Remember: Carbon Relay collects articles from 39 free sources. Use ./pipeline -sources=all-free -perSource=5 for standard runs. See CLAUDE.md for details.
